text:
You were right! ;)

From /var/log/messages: 
Jun 27 14:02:14 repo kernel: swap_pager: out of swap space
Jun 27 14:02:15 repo kernel: swp_pager_getswapspace(13): failed
Jun 27 14:13:47 repo kernel: pid 82297 (c++), jid 23, uid 65534, was killed: failed to reclaim memory

I'll try again with more RAM & larger swap. 
Tnx!
